---
species: "Unknown Crustose Coralline Algae"
accepted_code: "UCCA"
alternate_codes: ["EC", "NGCA"]
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Coralline algae"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Encrusting calcareous/hard red algae"
image: '/header_images/unknown_coralline_wikipedia.jpg'
categories:
  - red algal crusts
  - unknown
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 852
---

![](/header_images/unknown_coralline_wikipedia.jpg)

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Any encrusting (calcified), or hardened, pink/red/purple-ish algae growing in patches. Growing synonymous along rocks/hard surfaces. Can be bumpy, textured, or completely flat.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** NOT erect like Corallina officinalis

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
